entry.title: 博客搭建笔记
entry.content:
19年底弄过一次，几个月前折腾电脑翻车了重新装了个系统，Github上面的仓库也在但我还是把以前的那个删了新建了一个，希望这个可以用久一点，记录学习过程中遇到的问题以及解决办法。

The following is a record of the process of building the blog

First install node，Go to the official website and download the LTS version.
cmd node-v npm -v

Domestic with Taobao mirror source for the next operation will be faster (with a ladder can be used without)
npm install -g cnpm --registry=https://registry.npm.taobao.org
-g global install
cnmp -v

Then use cnpm install hexo frame
cnpm install -g hexo-cli
hexo -v

Go to the blog directory G: & cd/Project/Blog
Cerate hexo framehexo init
A blog post will be generated automatically
hexo s (s-server)
Then enter the URL http://localhost:4000/ view

create new bloghexo new "blog name"
Use vim,notepad or Typora writing content
After save exit hexo clean
Generate web pageshexo g(g-generate)

Restart heox s
You can see the previous blog on the localhost

cnpm install --save hexo-deployer-git

The following warnings may apply

Verion 9 of Highlight.js has reached EOL.
It will no longer be supported or receive security updates in the future.
Please upgrade to version 10 or encourage your indirect dependencies to do so.

Need to install the latest version
cnpm install highlight.js@latest
reference: https://github.com/highlightjs/highlight.js/issues/2882

Create a repository in GitHub which named ooblivion(name).github.io
https://github.com/ooblivion/ooblivion.github.io.git

notepad _config.yml
End of document

git bash
hexo d

Change theme
git clone https://github.com/fluid-dev/hexo-theme-fluid.git themes/fluid

git clone https://github.com/ppoffice/hexo-theme-icarus.git themes/icarus

notepad _config.yml
hexo clean
hexo g
hexo s
hexo d

Conlusion
we need git node.js
Theme
https://hexo.fluid-dev.com/
https://github.com/fluid-dev/hexo-theme-fluid
Reference
手把手教你从0开始搭建自己的个人博客 |无坑版视频教程| hexo
Thanks to Codesheep

hexo常用命令

hexo n “博客名称” => hexo new “博客名称” #这两个都是创建新文章，前者是简写模式
$ hexo p => hexo publish
$ hexo g => hexo generate #生成
$ hexo s => hexo server #启动服务预览
$ hexo d => hexo deploy #部署

$ hexo server #Hexo 会监视文件变动并自动更新，无须重启服务器。
$ hexo server -s #静态模式
$ hexo server -p 5000 #更改端口
$ hexo server -i 192.168.1.1 #自定义IP
$ hexo clean #清除缓存，网页正常情况下可以忽略此条命令

参考网站

https://juejin.cn/post/6844903713811890189

夜间模式
https://blog.asahih.com/hexo-icarus-night-mode/
hexo s 报错
https://www.haoyizebo.com/posts/710984d0/

新文章模板

hexo 分类和标签

分类(categories)具有顺序性和层次性。Hexo 不支持指定多个同级分类。

标签(tags)没有顺序和层次。

以上会使分类 Life 成为 Diary 的子分类, 而不是并列分类。

博客的其他配置

  1. Search
    Install search plugin
    npm install hexo-generator-searchdb –save

blog_config.yml add to the end

next_config.yml false->true

  1. 新建页面
    $ hexo new page “tags”
    $ hexo new page “categories”
    $ hexo new page “about”
    分类有顺序，标签没顺序

all done
entry.summary: 19年底弄过一次，几个月前折腾电脑翻车了重新装了个系统，Github上面的仓库也在但我还是把以前的那个删了新建了一个，希望这个可以用久一点，记录学习过程中遇到的问题以及解决办法。
